title: Lucid Group Q1 2024 Earnings Results
text: Lucid Group Q1 2024 Earnings Summary. Revenue Performance: Lucid reported Q1 2024 revenue of $172.7 million, surpassing analyst expectations of $156.99 million. This represented growth from $149.4 million in Q1 2023. Vehicle Deliveries: The company delivered 1,967 vehicles during the quarter, reflecting a 39.9% increase year-over-year. Production: Manufacturing output reached 1,728 vehicles, aligning with the company's target to produce approximately 9,000 vehicles annually. Net Loss: Lucid posted a net loss of $680.9 million, exceeding the estimated loss of $653.86 million. This represented improvement from prior year's Q1 loss of $779.5 million. Cash Burn: The company experienced negative free cash flow of $714.9 million, showing substantial improvement from the previous year's negative cash flow of $1.04 billion. Liquidity Position: Lucid ended the quarter with approximately $5.03 billion in total liquidity.
